summary: Vendor Management System feature tested successfully. Backend: All vendor categories, vendor CRUD, vendor summary, and project vendor assignments endpoints working. Frontend: Vendor Management page loads at /vendor-management with vendor cards, Create Vendor dialog with 4 tabs (Basic, Account, Brands, GST & Payment), dynamic category dropdown with '+ Add New Category' option, vendor detail view with 3 tabs including Summary with stats cards. Planning header correctly shows 'Vendors' navigation. ProjectDetail Materials tab has 4 sub-tabs (Materials, Vendors, Orders Status, Payment Status) with Assign Vendor functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: VendorMasterManagement.jsx is well-structured with proper state management and API integration
Vendor categories seeded with 16 material types (Cement, Sand, Steel, etc.)
AppHeader.jsx correctly includes 'Vendors' nav link for planning role at path /vendor-management
ProjectDetail.jsx Materials tab sub-tabs properly implemented with role-based access control for Assign Vendor button
seed_data_creation: Backend test created TEST_ prefixed vendors and categories for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Management feature is fully working. The VendorMasterManagement.jsx uses named import for AppHeader: import { AppHeader }. 16 vendor categories are seeded (Cement, Sand, Steel, Bricks, Aggregate, Tiles, Electrical, Plumbing, Paint, Hardware, Glass, Roofing, Waterproofing, HVAC, Chemical). Test vendors exist with prefix TEST_. The project detail Materials tab now has 4 sub-tabs with vendor assignments visible. Backend endpoints: /api/vendor-categories (GET/POST), /api/vendor-master (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE), /api/vendor-master/{id}/summary (GET), /api/projects/{id}/vendor-assignments (GET/POST/DELETE), /api/purchase-orders (GET/POST/PATCH)

backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-categories: PASS - Creates new category, rejects duplicates
backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-master: PASS - Creates vendor with all fields including brands
backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-master/{id}/summary: PASS - Returns vendor with stats (orders, payments, projects)

frontend_ui.VendorManagement page: PASS - Loads at /vendor-management with vendor cards
frontend_ui.Create Vendor dialog: PASS - Has 4 tabs (Basic, Account, Brands, GST & Payment)
frontend_ui.Vendor Type dropdown: PASS - Shows categories with '+ Add New Category' at top
frontend_ui.Vendor Detail dialog: PASS - Has 3 tabs (Details, Brands & Materials, Summary)
frontend_ui.Vendor Summary tab: PASS - Shows stats cards (Total Orders, Order Value, Paid, Pending)
frontend_ui.Planning header 'Vendors' link: PASS - Found in nav, navigates to /vendor-management
frontend_ui.ProjectDetail Materials sub-tabs: PASS - Has 4 sub-tabs (Materials, Vendors, Orders Status, Payment Status)
frontend_ui.Assign Vendor button: PASS - Visible to planning role in Vendors sub-tab
frontend_ui.Assign Vendor dialog: PASS - Has Category and Vendor dropdowns
